retrieved_result: AUSTIN WEATHER AUSTIN WEATHERWith more than 300 sunny days each year, Austin locals and visitors alike spend plenty of time outdoors. And it's no wonder. The winters are temperate. The summers are, well, a little toasty. And the spring and fall offer up the perfect balance of bright blue sky and mild temperatures.
